reviews.review_description:
I also thought about making a tower defense game in VR but yours is already better than what I had in mind. Great work.

I can offer some ideas for further improvements:
- There are trees hovering in mid air (In one of the early levels). 
- The early levels are to easy actually all levels are a bit to easy. Would be nice if you can only survive if you are resource aware and use a good strategy. I never had to use the whole field to protect the castle the levels are to short to make full use of the whole area.
- I would like to get money for every enemy and build towers even when the wave has started because sometimes I have time to do something when the enemies are still far away.
- I think my phone (S7) could handle even better graphics, fancier effects or more enemies a high and low graphic setting would be nice
- you could make use of the controller maybe as a sword for enemyes close by or by using the controller to aim similar to thr game "Wants"
- a speed up button would be nice in case you already have an effectiv tower set up
- I can shoot through some objects
- more towers and more unique tower updates would be nice

I hope for some great updates in the near future keep developing.

This title reminded me of "Evil Robot Traffic Jam", a strongly immersive title that I finished recently. The difference is, this game has a more cartoonish tone, making it cute and beautiful! I also liked the fact that you not only organize towers and traps before the raid of your enemies, you can also shoot by pressing the touchpad! Which makes you part of the battle. The 3D depth is normal, but still...5 stars, cause yeah, it's that fun. If you love strategy games, analyzing "where should I put this trap?", download it. Great job, developers!
